name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.66: catalog dedupe. New POST /api/v1/products/dedupe removes orphaned duplicate catalog rows (the unreferenced second copy of a product that exists under two goodsIds). Dry-run by default (returns exactly what it would delete); only acts on body confirm DELETE. Each candidate is re-checked for references at delete time, so a keeper or any row referenced by stock, sales, history or planograms is never removed, only true zero-reference orphans. Deletes are safe because nothing foreign-keys products. Cumulative over v5.65.
